description: If the proxy’s implementation contract exposes `selfdestruct` (or `SELFDESTRUCT` reachable through a function), an attacker or careless admin can destroy the implementation. The proxy then points to a non-existent code address, bricking upgrades or locking funds.
name: Proxy Implementation Selfdestruct Exposure
remediation: - Remove or disable `selfdestruct` in implementations; use `disableInitializers()` patterns. - Gate any destruct-like functionality behind timelock + multisig and migration plans. - Monitor implementation addresses and block upgrades that reduce code size to zero.
